title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2, positioning itself as both partner and competitor to OpenAI. The moves represent a full-stack AI strategy spanning reasoning models, agents, quantum hardware, and developer tools.
